text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while Mejiro Dober and I are having a
meeting in my office...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Sorry to interrupt. Trainer, do you have a minute?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I came to deliver good news!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober, the URA has selected you as the
senior-year Goddess! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The title of Goddess is awarded to those who run
in races like the Hanshin J.F., Triple Tiara, and
Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The accolade is awarded to one racer in each
year: junior, classic, and senior. It's a huge honor
for Mejiro Dober to be selected to represent her
year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Me... the senior-year Goddess!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I did it!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! ♪ The award ceremony is going
to be held in a few days, so don't forget to
prepare a speech!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you'll have quite the audience. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Understood.
choice_data_list:
We'd better give them a speech befitting your
new title!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't agree more. We have our work cut out
for us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the award ceremony arrives in the
blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober successfully gives her speech
without the slightest stumble!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
She's fully established her new identity, hasn't
she? She has the bearing of a newly crowned
queen.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
She does! I can't even begin to guess what great
feats she'll be accomplishing from here on out.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Behold, a gift! One of your underclassmen has
prepared a bouquet of flowers for you!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: C-congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: U-um! I-I just wanted to say...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: I really look up to you!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm training really, really hard so I can be just like
you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You don't have to try to become like me, though.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You have your own light inside yourself. Keep
working hard, but work hard as yourself and
nobody else.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to racing against you—the
you that only you can be—someday.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Wow... Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-well, it's certainly not me! It's just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oops, am I smiling? I didn't realize. But I am
happy. After all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: She said she looks up to me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: She said she looks up to me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I have to work hard as well so I can remain an
inspiration for her, the way Air Groove was an
inspiration for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's incredible accomplishments are
evident to everyone as the award ceremony
comes to an end!
